title: OP-2 Deterministic Resource Trace Summary
acceptance_criteria: summary derives from existing resource-transition output
resource-transition and scenario-suite semantics do not change
nominal and constrained cases produce exact deterministic summaries
deterministic text and JSON CLI surfaces exist
existing run-scenario --json hashes remain unchanged from the OP-1 checkpoint
existing run-suite --json hashes remain unchanged from the OP-1 checkpoint
resource_trace_summary becomes true only after implementation and tests
simulation, scheduler, telemetry, external-network, Bitcoin, AI, wallet, hardware-control, and mission-authority claims remain false
canonical verification covers the resource trace summary surface
final evidence is bound to the exact final head
OP-2 can be reverted independently of the OP-1 checkpoint
external_side_effect_boundaries: no wallet, payment, or real mining behavior
rollback_method: Revert the OP-2 commit range after fc995df915e0df62ff602c95517f21b881049391 and rerun pwsh -NoProfile -File .\eng.ps1 verify to return to the reviewed OP-1 checkpoint.
evidence_expectations: OP-1 checkpoint evidence remains available under .agent-harness/artifacts/op-1-op-2/op-1-checkpoint/
terminal scan raw-root, encoded-root, sentinel, and scanner-error counts are zero
scenario and suite output hash comparisons are recorded
c3_harness_004_disposition: open / accepted_for_offline_v0.2; not fixed, passed, or closed by OP-2
